flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Framingham State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.6k vs 3.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Framingham State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Framingham State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (49.5% vs 56.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Framingham State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
